name: LiftLab
description: Marketing measurement platform unifying agile MMM and holdout-based incrementality experiments.

seo.title: LiftLab — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: LiftLab: Marketing measurement platform unifying agile MMM and holdout-based incrementality experiments.

when_to_use: Agile MMM updated frequently for rapid media spend decision cycles
Holdout-based incrementality experiments validating paid channel value
Marketing measurement platform combining model and experiment-based approaches
Measuring incrementality of upper-funnel channels lacking direct attribution

pros: Combines agile MMM with true holdout testing
cons: Requires steady ad spend to run holdouts
Not an MMP — needs a tracker underneath
review.verdict: Rigorous MMM plus experiment platform for data-mature teams, but overkill for small UA operations.
review.best_for: Data-mature enterprise marketing teams running frequent holdout-based incrementality tests.
review.not_for: Small marketers without the spend or headcount to run structured experiments.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
